function.description: Semantic search over the knowledge lake. Returns ranked chunk hits with scores and citation metadata. Supports dense, sparse, and hybrid retrieval modes.
function.name: search

parameters.description:
Query parameters for GET /search and the MCP ``search`` tool (D-02).

Pydantic validates these before the handler runs, satisfying ASVS V5
(input validation at the API boundary).

Extended in Plan 12-03 to cover every ``search()`` filter kwarg so that
``SearchParams().model_dump(exclude_none=True)`` unpacks cleanly into
``search(**kwargs)`` without an unexpected-keyword error (Pitfall 4,
SKILL-03 no-drift rule).

Handler note: ``q`` maps to the ``query`` positional arg of ``search()``;
callers must pass it as ``search(query=params.q, **rest)`` (the field
is kept as ``q`` for URL-query-parameter brevity in GET /search).

document_type.description: Payload filter: restrict results to this document type (e.g. 'regulation').
document_type.title: Document Type

domain.description: Payload filter: restrict results to this domain (e.g. 'healthcare').
domain.title: Domain

format.description: Payload filter: restrict results to this source format (e.g. 'pdf', 'html'). Shadows Python built-in — only safe because the built-in is not used within this class scope (mirrors noqa A002 in search.py).
format.title: Format

min_quality_score.description: Payload filter: only return chunks with quality_score >= this value.
min_quality_score.title: Min Quality Score

mode.description: Search mode; default resolves from KLAKE_SEARCH__MODE (hybrid). Must be one of: hybrid, dense, sparse. An unrecognised value is rejected with 422 (T-10-02, ASVS V5).
mode.title: Mode

source_id.description: Payload filter: restrict results to chunks from this source registry ID.
source_id.title: Source Id

source_name.description: Payload filter: restrict results to this source name.
source_name.title: Source Name

tags.description: Payload filter: restrict results to chunks whose tags contain all of the listed values. Single tag uses MatchValue; multiple use MatchAny (D-11).
tags.title: Tags

top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return.
top_k.title: Top K

parameters.title: SearchParams

function.description: List registered sources in the knowledge lake registry. Supports optional domain filtering and pagination.
function.name: list_sources

parameters.description:
MCP ``list_sources`` tool input — maps to ``pipeline.query.list_sources()``.

``list_sources()`` signature:
    list_sources(domain=None, *, limit=50, offset=0)

limit.description: Maximum number of sources to return.
limit.title: Limit

parameters.title: ListSourcesInput

function.description: Trace the full ancestry chain of any artifact. Returns an ordered list of nodes from the queried artifact back to the original raw document.
function.name: lineage

parameters.description:
MCP ``lineage`` tool input — maps to ``lineage.resolve_ancestry(artifact_id)``.

The FastAPI endpoint uses artifact_id as a path parameter; the MCP tool
passes it as a body field.  Security: the lineage resolver raises
LookupError on unknown IDs (no SSRF surface — DB-only lookup).

artifact_id.description: Artifact ID to trace lineage for (type-prefixed UUIDv7, e.g. 'chk_...').
artifact_id.title: Artifact Id

parameters.title: LineageInput

function.description: Return aggregate statistics about the knowledge lake: source count, document count, artifact counts by type, and Qdrant vector point count.
function.name: stats

parameters.description:
MCP ``stats`` tool input — maps to ``pipeline.query.stats()``.

``stats()`` signature: stats(*, collection="klake_chunks", domain=None)
All fields are optional; defaults mirror the pipeline function defaults.

collection.description: Qdrant collection to count points in.
collection.title: Collection

domain.description: Optional domain to scope source and artifact counts (e.g. 'healthcare').
domain.title: Domain

parameters.title: StatsInput

function.description: Ingest a single document from a URL into the knowledge lake. Fetches, stores in the raw zone, and returns the artifact ID. SSRF-guarded via validate_public_url (RFC-1918/IMDS blocked).
function.name: ingest_url

parameters.description:
MCP ``ingest_url`` tool input — maps to ``pipeline.ingest.ingest_url()``.

``ingest_url()`` signature:
    ingest_url(url, source_name, *, mime_type=None, license_type="unknown",
               robots_checked=False, settings=None)

SSRF guard (ASVS V5, T-12-07): scheme/SSRF validation is performed by
``ingest_url()`` itself — this model validates the surface-level format only.
Do NOT re-implement the guard here (DRY, plan prohibition).

mime_type.description: MIME type override (e.g. 'application/pdf'). Defaults to Content-Type header.
mime_type.title: Mime Type

robots_checked.description: Set to True only after verifying robots.txt allows fetching.
robots_checked.title: Robots Checked

source_name.description: Human-readable name for the source registry entry.
source_name.title: Source Name

url.description: https:// URL of the document to ingest.
url.title: Url

parameters.title: IngestUrlInput

function.description: Register a new source in the knowledge lake registry. Deduplicates by normalized URL — returns existing source if already present.
function.name: add_source

parameters.description:
Request body for POST /sources — register a new source.

Pydantic validates these at the API boundary (ASVS V5, T-02-04).

name.description: Human-readable source name (defaults to URL hostname).
name.title: Name

url.description: https:// URL of the source to register.
url.title: Url

parameters.title: SourceCreate

function.description: Start a crawl job for a seed URL. Follows links up to max_pages depth, stores raw HTML artifacts. Async — use process_crawled to parse and index after crawling.
function.name: crawl

parameters.description:
Request body for POST /crawl-jobs — start a crawl.

Pydantic validates at the API boundary (ASVS V5, T-02-13).

crawler.description: Override crawler adapter name (must be a registered crawler).
crawler.title: Crawler

max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl.
max_pages.title: Max Pages

parameters.title: CrawlJobCreate

function.description: Batch-crawl all registered sources (or a domain subset). Runs each source crawl independently — failures on one source do not abort others.
function.name: crawl_all

parameters.description:
MCP ``crawl_all`` tool input — maps to ``pipeline.crawl.crawl_all_sources()``.

``crawl_all_sources()`` signature:
    crawl_all_sources(domain=None, settings=None)

``settings`` is internal infrastructure — not exposed as a tool input field.

domain.description: Optional domain filter; when set, only sources matching this domain are crawled.
domain.title: Domain

parameters.title: CrawlAllInput

function.description: Process crawled raw_document artifacts through the full pipeline: parse → chunk → embed → index. Finds all unprocessed raw docs and converts them to searchable vectors.
function.name: process_crawled

parameters.description:
MCP ``process_crawled`` tool input — maps to ``pipeline.process.process_crawled()``.

``process_crawled()`` signature:
    process_crawled(*, source_id=None, limit=100, collection="klake_chunks")

collection.description: Qdrant collection to index chunks into.
collection.title: Collection

limit.description: Maximum number of raw documents to process.
limit.title: Limit

source_id.description: Restrict processing to raw docs from this source registry ID.
source_id.title: Source Id

parameters.title: ProcessCrawledInput

function.description: Export the curated knowledge lake corpus to the gold zone. Supports three kinds: 'rag-corpus' (Parquet), 'pretrain' (JSONL), 'finetune' (JSONL from a named dataset).
function.name: export

parameters.description:
Request body for POST /exports.

Bounded to the three valid export kinds via Pydantic pattern validation
(T-05-09: no free-form string ever reaches the gold-zone S3 key construction).

dataset_name.description: Required for kind='finetune'. The logical Dataset name to export.
dataset_name.title: Dataset Name

parameters.title: ExportRequest

function.description: Load a domain pack and register all its sources. Reads the domain YAML, validates, and registers each source via add_source.
function.name: init_domain

parameters.description:
Request body for POST /domains/load — load a domain pack and register its sources.

Security (T-06-08 / ASVS V5):
    - name validated against r'^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]{0,63}$' via Pydantic pattern.
    - Pattern blocks path traversal attempts (e.g. '../etc', 'foo/../bar').
parameters.title: DomainLoadRequest
